Part.Source: Event Start loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &CredAuxPlanHie = '1.' &FixAuxPlanHie = '2.' &VarAuxPlanHie = '3.' &NaoAuxPlanHie = '4.' &selecionar.Title = 'Clique' &selecionar2.Title = 'Clique' &selecionar3.Title = 'Clique' &selecionar4.Title = 'Clique' &IrFinAno = &FinAno &IrFinMes = &FinMes &CredFinVlr.Enabled = 1 &DebFinVlr.Enabled = 1 &VarDebFinVlr.Enabled = 1 &NaoDebFinVlr.Enabled = 1 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CredAuxPlanHie.Visible = False &FixAuxPlanHie.Visible = False &VarAuxPlanHie.Visible = False &NaoAuxPlanHie.Visible = False GridDebitosNao_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridDebitosNao.InternalName GridDebitosNao.Rows = 100 GridDebitosVar_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridDebitosVar.InternalName GridDebitosVar.Rows = 100 GridDebitos_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridDebitos.InternalName GridDebitos.Rows = 100 GridCreditos_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridCreditos.InternalName GridCreditos.Rows = 100 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridDebitosNao.Load &NaoDebPlanHie = PlanHie &NaoDebPlanNom = PlanNom &NaoDebFinVlr = FinVlr &NaoPlanCod = PlanCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &selecionar4 = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &TotalDespesaNaoOpe += &naoDebFinVlr &TotalDespesaGeral = &TotalDespesaVariavel + &TotalDespesaFixa + &TotalDespesaNaoOpe EndEvent Event GridDebitosVar.Load &VarDebPlanHie = PlanHie &VarDebPlanNom = PlanNom &VarDebFinVlr = FinVlr &VarDebPlanCod = PlanCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &selecionar3 = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &TotalDespesaVariavel += &VarDebFinVlr &TotalDespesaOperacional = &TotalDespesaVariavel + &TotalDespesaFixa &TotalDespesaGeral = &TotalDespesaVariavel + &TotalDespesaFixa + &TotalDespesaNaoOpe EndEvent Event GridDebitos.Load &DebPlanHie = PlanHie &DebPlanNom = PlanNom &DebFinVlr = FinVlr &DebPlanCod = PlanCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &selecionar2 = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &TotalDespesaFixa += &DebFinVlr &TotalDespesaOperacional = &TotalDespesaVariavel + &TotalDespesaFixa &TotalDespesaGeral = &TotalDespesaVariavel + &TotalDespesaFixa + &TotalDespesaNaoOpe EndEvent Event GridCreditos.Load &CredPlanHie = PlanHie &CredPlanNom = PlanNom &CredFinVlr = FinVlr &CredPlanCod = PlanCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &selecionar = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &TotalReceitas += &CredFinVlr EndEvent Event 'DoVoltar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWTotaisFinanceiro.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInserir' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpAddTotalFinanceiro.PopUp(0, 0, 0, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ wpEditarTodosCustos.Link(&FinAno, &FinMes) EndEvent Event 'DoImprimir' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpImprimeTotalFinanceiro.PopUp() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoTrocar' RetornaAlgumLancamento.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &IrFinAno, &IrFinMes) wpEditarTodosCustos.Link(&IrFinAno, &IrFinMes) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //Code block: LoadWWPContext LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &TotalReceitas = 0 &TotalDespesaFixa = 0 &TotalDespesaOperacional = 0 &TotalDespesaVariavel = 0 &TotalDespesaNaoOpe = 0 &TotalDespesaGeral = 0 EndEvent Event &CredFinVlr.IsValid &GravPlanCod = &CredPlanCod &GravFinVlr = &CredFinVlr do 'GravaValores' do 'TotalCreditos' EndEvent Event &DebFinVlr.IsValid &GravPlanCod = &DebPlanCod &GravFinVlr = &DebFinVlr do 'GravaValores' do 'TotalDebitos' EndEvent Event &VarDebFinVlr.IsValid &GravPlanCod = &VarDebPlanCod &GravFinVlr = &VarDebFinVlr do 'GravaValores' do 'TotalDebitosVar' EndEvent Event &NaoDebFinVlr.IsValid &GravPlanCod = &NaoPlanCod &GravFinVlr = &NaoDebFinVlr do 'GravaValores' do 'TotalDebitosNao' EndEvent Event &selecionar.Click &CredFinVlr.SetFocus() EndEvent Event &selecionar2.Click &DebFinVlr.SetFocus() EndEvent Event &selecionar3.Click &VarDebFinVlr.SetFocus() EndEvent Event &selecionar4.Click &naoDebFinVlr.SetFocus() EndEvent Event Enter Dashboard.Link() EndEvent Sub 'GravaValores' prcGravaTotalFinanceiro.Call( 'ADD', &EmpCod, &GravPlanCod, &FinAno, &FinMes, &GravFinVlr) EndSub Sub 'TotalCreditos' &TotalReceitas = 0 For Each Line in gridCreditos &TotalReceitas += &CredFinVlr EndFor EndSub Sub 'TotalDebitosVar' &TotalDespesaVariavel = 0 For Each Line in gridDebitosVar &TotalDespesaVariavel += &VarDebFinVlr EndFor &TotalDespesaOperacional = &TotalDespesaVariavel + &TotalDespesaFixa &TotalDespesaGeral = &TotalDespesaVariavel + &TotalDespesaFixa + &TotalDespesaNaoOpe EndSub Sub 'TotalDebitosNao' &TotalDespesaNaoOpe = 0 For Each Line in gridDebitosNao &TotalDespesaNaoOpe += &naoDebFinVlr EndFor &TotalDespesaGeral = &TotalDespesaVariavel + &TotalDespesaFixa + &TotalDespesaNaoOpe EndSub Sub 'TotalDebitos' &TotalDespesaFixa = 0 For Each Line in gridDebitos &TotalDespesaFixa += &DebFinVlr EndFor &TotalDespesaOperacional = &TotalDespesaVariavel + &TotalDespesaFixa &TotalDespesaGeral = &TotalDespesaVariavel + &TotalDespesaFixa + &TotalDespesaNaoOpe EndSub
